inputs.label: Wall Area (m²)
inputs.businessContext: Total surface area that requires spackling

inputs.label: Number of Holes
inputs.businessContext: Approximate count of holes to fill

inputs.label: Average Hole Diameter (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of typical holes in millimeters

inputs.label: Average Hole Depth (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Depth of typical holes in millimeters

inputs.label: Spackle Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the spackle compound used

inputs.label: Container Size (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Net weight of a single spackle container

inputs.label: Waste Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Extra material to account for waste and spillage
